texto: They say that to know oneself is to know all there is that is human. But of course no one can ever know himself. Nothing human is fully calculable
autor: even to ourselves we are strange.
explicacao: Citação de even to ourselves we are strange. sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “They say that to know oneself is to know all there is that is human. But of course no one can eve…” articula autoestima, gore-vidal, julian em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como julian.
